title: Get a Cheap Peugeot 308 UK: Common Issues, Buyer Tips & Value Guide
metaDescription: Unlock a great deal on a cheap Peugeot 308 UK. Learn common faults, essential checks, and how to find a reliable one. Your honest guide from BuyAndScrap.
content:
# Get a Cheap Peugeot 308 UK: Common Issues, Buyer Tips & Value Guide

Looking for a reliable and affordable hatchback? A used Peugeot 308 offers fantastic value in the UK market. To find a good quality **cheap Peugeot 308 UK**, focus on a full service history, inspect key common faults like engine issues (especially on older petrol models), and thoroughly check all electrics. This guide will help you buy smart and avoid a money pit. You can start browsing options right away on [BuyAndScrap](/cars).

## Why a Cheap Peugeot 308 UK is a Smart Choice

The Peugeot 308 consistently earns praise for its blend of practicality, style, and low running costs. As a used car, it’s a brilliant option for budget-conscious buyers looking for quality. Here's why it often stands out:

### Stylish Design That Lasts

Peugeot has perfected its design language. Both the first (Mk1) and second (Mk2) generations of the 308 boast sleek lines and a sophisticated look. This means your affordable 308 won't look outdated, giving you a lot of car for your money. Mk2 models, in particular, feature the modern 'i-Cockpit' design, which many drivers love.

### Practical for UK Roads and Families

The 308 offers generous boot space and a comfortable cabin. It's a versatile car, perfect for daily commutes, school runs, or longer trips across the country. Whether you're a solo driver or need space for a growing family, a cheap 308 fits the bill.

### Economical Engines for Lower Bills

Throughout its lifespan, the 308 has featured a range of efficient engines. You’ll find models with impressive MPG figures, from the popular 1.6 HDi diesels to the later 1.2 PureTech petrol engines. This helps you save money at the pumps, which is a major bonus when you’re looking for a **cheap Peugeot 308 UK**.

### Comfortable Driving Experience

The 308 delivers a comfortable ride, soaking up bumps on typical British roads. It handles predictably, feels secure on motorways, and makes for a relaxed driving experience. It’s not a sports car, but it’s certainly pleasant to drive.

## Generations of the Peugeot 308: What to Look For

Understanding the different generations helps you target your search. Each offers distinct features and potential price points.

### Peugeot 308 Mk1 (2007-2013)

This is where you'll find the absolute lowest prices for a 308. Based on the older 307 platform, it still offers decent comfort and practicality. However, the Mk1 is often criticised for specific engine reliability issues, especially with the 1.6 VTi and THP petrol engines. Be extra vigilant with service history for these models.

### Peugeot 308 Mk2 (2013-2021)

The Mk2 marked a big leap forward. It features much improved design, higher interior quality, and better efficiency. This generation introduced the distinctive i-Cockpit, significantly lighter construction, and more reliable PureTech petrol and BlueHDi diesel engines. It still represents excellent value on the used market.

## Common Peugeot 308 Issues to Watch Out For

Knowing common problems is crucial when buying any used car. For a cheap 308, focus on these areas during your inspection.

### Engine Problems (Mk1 1.6 VTi/THP Petrols)

Early 1.6 VTi and THP petrol engines (co-developed with BMW) are notorious for timing chain wear and excessive oil consumption. Listen for rattles, especially on cold start-up. Check for blue smoke from the exhaust. A full service history, proving regular oil changes with the correct grade, is essential here.

### Electrical Gremlins

Peugeot models can sometimes suffer from electrical issues. Check everything: infotainment system, parking sensors, electric windows, climate control, and all dashboard warning lights. Ensure no 'service' or engine warning lights stay on after starting the engine.

### Suspension Wear

Listen for knocks or clonks over bumps, particularly from the front suspension. Worn bushes or shock absorbers are common, especially on higher mileage or older examples. These can be costly to fix if ignored.

### Diesel Particulate Filter (DPF) Issues

For 1.6 HDi and BlueHDi diesel models, especially if used for short, stop-start journeys, the DPF can clog. This leads to reduced performance and warning lights. Ensure the car has been regularly driven on longer runs. Check if the DPF has been replaced or cleaned if the mileage is high.

### Air Conditioning System

Test the air conditioning thoroughly. Ensure it blows ice cold. Leaks or a failing compressor can be expensive repairs, so factor this into your budget if it’s not working.

## Your Essential Checklist for Buying a Cheap Peugeot 308 UK

Follow these tips to secure a great deal on a dependable 308.

### 1. Insist on a Full Service History

Proof of regular maintenance is your best friend. A complete service book with stamps or invoices shows the car has been looked after. Pay close attention to timing belt changes for diesel engines – they're critical. If buying a Mk1 1.6 VTi/THP, ensure regular oil changes are documented.

### 2. Check the MOT History Online

Use our [Free MOT Checker](/mot-checker) to view previous MOT results. Look for recurring advisories on things like tyres, brakes, or suspension. This can highlight ongoing issues or areas that will need attention soon.

### 3. Take a Thorough Test Drive

Don't rush it. Drive the car on various road types. Listen for unusual noises, check the steering feels true, and test the brakes firmly. Make sure the gearbox shifts smoothly, both manual and automatic. Test all electrics, including radio, lights, and wipers.

### 4. Inspect the Bodywork and Interior

Look for signs of accident damage, mismatched paint, or poor repairs. Check for rust, particularly around wheel arches and sills. Inside, look for excessive wear and tear on seats, carpets, and controls. This can indicate heavy use or neglect.

### 5. Be Wary of Warning Lights

When you start the car, all dashboard warning lights should illuminate briefly and then extinguish. If any stay on, or if the seller tries to clear them before you arrive, it's a red flag. Get a diagnostic check if you're unsure.

## FAQs About Buying a Cheap Peugeot 308 UK

### Q: Are cheap Peugeot 308s reliable?

A: Generally, Mk2 Peugeot 308s (2013-2021) with PureTech petrol or BlueHDi diesel engines are quite reliable. Earlier Mk1 models, especially with the 1.6 VTi or THP petrol engines, can suffer from known timing chain and oil consumption issues. Always prioritise a full service history and thorough inspection.

### Q: What's the best engine for a used 308?

A: For Mk2 models, the 1.2 PureTech petrol engine (available in 110bhp or 130bhp) offers a good balance of economy and performance. If you do more motorway miles, the 1.6 BlueHDi or 2.0 BlueHDi diesels are very economical and generally robust. Avoid the older Mk1 1.6 VTi/THP if possible, unless it has impeccable service records.

### Q: How much should I pay for a cheap Peugeot 308?

A: Prices vary hugely based on age, mileage, condition, and generation. Mk1 models can start from under £1,500. Mk2 models typically range from £4,000 to £10,000+ depending on year and specification. Always compare prices for similar cars and remember that cheaper cars might need more immediate maintenance.

### Q: Is the Peugeot 308 expensive to run?

A: No, the Peugeot 308 is generally considered affordable to run. Fuel economy is strong, especially with the PureTech and BlueHDi engines. Insurance costs are competitive for its class, and parts are readily available. Maintenance costs are reasonable, though specific repairs (like DPFs or timing chains) can be costly if neglected.

## Find Your Next Peugeot 308 with Confidence

Buying a **cheap Peugeot 308 UK** can be an excellent decision. It offers style, practicality, and efficiency without breaking the bank. By following our honest advice and knowing what to look for, you can find a dependable motor that serves you well for years to come.

Ready to get started? [Browse our current selection of cars](/cars) today. If you're looking to upgrade, you can also consider [selling your current car](/sell) with us. For more expert advice, check out our [guides](/guides) section.
